data.title: Skill tool cannot resolve dso:onboarding — returns Unknown skill
data.description: When invoking /dso:onboarding via the Skill tool, it returns Unknown skill: dso:onboarding. The skill file exists at plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md and is listed in the available skills. Fallback to reading SKILL.md directly works. Reproduction: invoke Skill tool with skill=dso:onboarding.
